name: The Trackless Sea
summary: A vast tropical ocean west of Faerûn. Ships travelling south towards Chult cross unpredictable waters filled with storms, pirates, sea monsters, hidden reefs, drifting wreckage and forgotten dangers.
politics: Sea lanes are shaped by merchant companies, naval patrols, pirates and independent captains.
Law becomes thinner the further a ship sails from major ports.
culture: Sailors trade rumours as readily as coin.
A ship crew becomes a small travelling village where rank, trust and routine matter.
Superstition is common at sea, especially around storms, wrecks and strange lights beneath the water.
